meaning: S3公司,全球最大的图像、视像及多媒体加速器供应商
examples: S3 is better for larger objects.
To begin using S3, you need an account.
You store your files in a “bucket” on S3.
Since the S3 was launched in Q2 2012 Samsung claim that they have shipped 40m S3s.
It is not after existing S3 owners who it will target with its next release.
